mapper.sql: rp.id, rp.student_id, rp.permit_no, rp.permit_type, rp.residence_address, rp.issue_date, rp.valid_from, rp.valid_until, rp.status, rp.remark, rp.deleted, rp.create_time, rp.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_permit (student_id, permit_no, permit_type, residence_address, issue_date, valid_from, valid_until, status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{permitNo}, #{permitType}, #{residenceAddress}, #{issueDate}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE residence_permit SET student_id = #{studentId}, permit_no = #{permitNo}, permit_type = #{permitType}, residence_address = #{residenceAddress}, issue_date = #{issueDate}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE residence_permit SET valid_until = #{validUntil}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE residence_permit SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM residence_permit rp LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rp.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.id = #{id} AND rp.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_permit rp LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rp.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM residence_permit rp LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rp.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0
ORDER BY rp.valid_until ASC, rp.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT FROM residence_permit rp LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rp.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.student_id = #{studentId} AND rp.deleted = 0 ORDER BY rp.valid_until DESC, rp.id DESC

SELECT FROM residence_permit rp LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rp.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.deleted = 0 AND rp.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED') AND rp.valid_until IS NOT NULL AND rp.valid_until <= #{deadline}
